name: My Seed Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the dry ingredients (bread flour, pecans, wheat flour, poppy seeds, rye flour, caraway seeds, cornmeal, dry milk, unprocessed bran, vinegar, salt, Puritan oil, sugar, and honey) in your bread machine according to its instructions.
2. Add the raisins and water to the bread machine as directed by your machine's manual.
3. Include the dry yeast in the yeast dispenser of your Panasonic bread machine, following the manufacturer's guidelines.
4. Mix all ingredients until a smooth dough forms.
5. Ensure the dough is well combined before proceeding with baking.
6. Bake according to your bread machine's settings.
7. Allow the loaf to cool slightly before serving.
This recipe yields a beautiful dense loaf with a sweet nutty flavor, perfect for enjoying by yourself or sharing with family and friends.
